LBL_readOnlyMode: read only mode - release of charge is not send to charger (to use RFID tags)
LBL_stateHomeBatSoc: object-id for current home battery state of charge [%]
LBL_stateHomePowerConsumption: object-id for current home power consumption [W]
LBL_stateHomeSolarPower: object-id for currently available solar power [W]
LBL_subtractSelfConsumption: Charger consumption is included in home power consumption value
LBL_cycleTime: Time between data polls from charger [ms]
